topic: Amazon Neptune Instance Type Selection Guide

  entities:
  
    Amazon Neptune|Service
    Neptune pricing page|Creative Work
    
  proposition: Amazon Neptune Instance Type Selection Guide
    
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    Amazon Neptune|HAS_GUIDE|Instance Type Selection Guide
      
  proposition: Amazon Neptune is a service that offers a number of different instance sizes and families.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    Amazon Neptune|HAS_TYPE|service
    Amazon Neptune|OFFERS|different instance sizes and families

  proposition: Amazon Neptune instance sizes and families offer different capabilities suited to different graph workloads.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    Amazon Neptune|HAS_CAPABILITIES|different capabilities suited to different graph workloads

  proposition: The section about choosing instance types for Amazon Neptune is meant to help users choose the best instance type for their needs.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    Amazon Neptune|HAS_PURPOSE|help users choose the best instance type for their needs

  proposition: The Neptune pricing page provides pricing information for each instance-type in Amazon Neptune families.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    Neptune pricing page|PROVIDES_FOR|Amazon Neptune
  
    entity-attributes:
    Neptune pricing page|PROVIDES|pricing information for each instance-type

  proposition: The Neptune pricing page is located at https://aws.amazon.com/neptune/pricing/.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    Neptune pricing page|LOCATED_AT|https://aws.amazon.com/neptune/pricing/
